chats.goToModels: Go to Models tab to start chatting
chats.emptyDescriptionDesktop: Focus on the conversation. Everything else gets out of the way.
chats.emptyDescriptionMobile: ChatBot is ready to help you think, write, debug, and keep a focused chat history.

chat.branchConfirm: Create a new branch from this message?
chat.clearHistoryConfirm: Delete all messages in this conversation?
chat.photoPermissionDenied: Photo library access is required to attach images.
chat.voiceInputUnavailable: Voice recording is not supported in this environment.
chat.noTtsProvider: No text-to-speech API is configured yet. Add a TTS API in Settings first.
chat.micPermissionDenied: Microphone access is required for voice input.
chat.noSttProvider: No OpenAI-compatible provider configured for speech-to-text. Please add a provider that supports the Whisper API.
chat.autoDiscussHint: System will auto-send "Continue" on your behalf to drive the discussion
chat.autoDiscussNeedMessage: Send a message first to set the discussion topic
chat.deleteConversationConfirm: This conversation and all its messages will be permanently deleted.
chat.removeWorkspaceConfirm: After removing it, this conversation will no longer be linked to a local project directory.
chat.applyFilesConfirm: These files will be written into the current workspace directory:

models.title: Models
models.configureHint: Configure a provider to pull available models

mcp.pageDescription: Extend your AI with real-time context, external tools, and live data by connecting local or remote MCP servers.
mcp.emptyDescription: Add a local or remote server to let your model access external tools and context through the standard MCP flow.
mcp.documentationDescription: The Model Context Protocol lets your assistant connect to external tools, databases, and local runtimes through a standardized interface. Prefer HTTPS endpoints when possible, and use stdio for local desktop commands.
mcp.builtInDescription: These built-in tools can be enabled directly inside the app without deploying an extra server.
mcp.importHint: Paste MCP server config JSON. Supports {mcpServers: {...}}, array, or single object format.
mcp.importNoTools: No valid tools found in JSON
mcp.importSuccess: Successfully imported {{count}} server(s). Enable them to verify connection.
mcp.importCommandNotSupported: This is a desktop MCP config (npx/uvx commands). Mobile only supports URL-based remote MCP servers. Please use a config with "url" fields.

settings.title: Settings
settings.sttModelHint: Groq recommends whisper-large-v3-turbo for best speed. OpenAI uses whisper-1.
settings.sttFetchRequiresFields: Please fill in Base URL and API Key first.
settings.voiceDescription: Configure separate custom OpenAI-compatible speech APIs for microphone transcription and message playback.
settings.sttSectionDescription: When recording stops, the captured audio is uploaded to your STT API and the transcript is inserted into the composer.
settings.ttsSectionDescription: Tap the speaker below a message to synthesize and play audio through your own TTS endpoint.
settings.deleteAllConversationsConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete all conversations? This action cannot be undone.
settings.securityTip: Security Tip: API Keys are stored only on this device and sent directly to your provider.
settings.generalDescription: Adjust appearance, language, and message behavior.
settings.indexDescription: Only the core configuration surfaces stay here: General, Models, MCP Servers, and Data Control.
settings.modelsDescription: Manage providers, connection health, and available models.
settings.mcpServersDescription: Manage built-in tools and remote MCP server connections.
settings.dataControlDescription: Export, import, or clear local app data on this device.
settings.themeDescription: Cycle between system, light, and dark appearance.
settings.languageDescription: Switch between system, English, and Chinese.
settings.contextCompressionDescription: Summarize earlier messages once the conversation becomes too long.
settings.enterToSendDescription: Press Enter to send, and Shift+Enter to add a new line.
settings.exportBackupDescription: Create a local backup of providers, settings, MCP servers, and chats.
settings.importBackupDescription: Restore a backup exported from ChatBot.
settings.deleteAllConversationsDescription: Clear all chat history from the current device.

providerEdit.name: Name
providerEdit.allFieldsRequired: Name and Base URL are required
providerEdit.duplicateName: A provider with this name already exists
providerEdit.connectionFailedHint: Check your API key and base URL.
providerEdit.encryptionHint: API keys are stored on-device and sent directly to your configured providers. They never pass through our servers.
providerEdit.directApi: Or use a provider's direct API

webConfig.scanOrVisit: Scan QR or visit in browser
webConfig.instructions: Open this URL on your computer to configure providers with a full keyboard.
webConfig.securityNote: Data is transmitted over your local network only. Nothing leaves your devices.
webConfig.visitUrl: Visit this URL on your computer:
webConfig.ipNotDetected: Unable to detect WiFi IP. Replace 0.0.0.0 with your phone's WiFi IP (check WiFi settings).
webConfig.pairingCodeLabel: Security Pairing Code (auto-filled on the web page)

toolEdit.name: Name
toolEdit.headersHint: Add headers for authentication (e.g. Authorization: Bearer xxx)
toolEdit.autoDisabled: Server has been disabled. Fix the URL or headers and try again.

privacy.privacyDesc: ChatBot is designed with privacy at its core. Your data stays on your device.
privacy.localOnlyDesc: All conversations, settings, and API keys are stored locally on your device (MMKV + SQLite). No data is sent to third-party servers.
privacy.apiKeyDesc: API keys are stored on-device only. They are sent directly to your configured provider endpoints and never pass through any intermediate servers.
privacy.noCloudDesc: No data is uploaded to any cloud service. You can use the backup/restore feature to transfer data between devices.
privacy.microphoneDesc: Used for voice input. Only active when you press the mic button.
privacy.cameraDesc: Used for scanning QR codes and capturing images for vision models.
privacy.photoLibraryDesc: Used for attaching images to conversations with vision-capable models.
privacy.dataManagementDesc: You can export or delete all your data at any time from the Settings page. We do not collect analytics or telemetry data.
